test_cases.description: base64Encode/base64Decode round-trip produces identical bytes
base64Encode produces correct base64 for known input
base64Encode of empty Uint8Array returns empty string
base64Decode produces correct bytes for known base64 string
base64Decode throws on invalid base64 characters
base64Encode throws when window.base64js is missing
verifySignature returns true for a valid Ed25519 detached signature
verifySignature returns false for tampered signature bytes
verifySignature returns false when public key does not match signing key
verifySignature returns false for non-base64 signature string
verifySignature returns false when a parameter is not a string
verifySignature returns false when decoded signature is not 64 bytes
verifySignature never throws - always returns boolean
padMessage pads small message to 1024-byte frame
unpadMessage(padMessage(m)) equals m for arbitrary input
padMessage handles empty Uint8Array and pads to 1024
padMessage pads 1022-byte message to 1024 (exactly fits)
padMessage pads 1023-byte message to 4096 (spills to next frame)
padMessage pads 4094-byte message to 4096
padMessage pads 4095-byte message to 16384
padMessage pads 16382-byte message to 16384
padMessage pads 16383-byte message to 65536
padMessage pads 65534-byte message to 65536
padMessage throws for message exceeding 65534 bytes
Last 2 bytes of padded frame encode original length as big-endian uint16
Padded frame is a new buffer not aliasing input
unpadMessage throws for frame shorter than 2 bytes
unpadMessage throws when encoded length exceeds available data
FRAME_SIZES is frozen array [1024, 4096, 16384, 65536]
FRAME_SIZES array is frozen and immutable
generatePseudonym returns same result for same inputs
generatePseudonym returns a 44-character base64 string
generatePseudonym produces different output for different channelIds
generatePseudonym produces different output for different secret keys
generatePseudonym throws when privateKeyBase64 is empty/null/undefined
generatePseudonym throws when decoded key is less than 32 bytes
generatePseudonym throws when channelId is empty/null/undefined
shortenPseudonym returns first 8 chars by default
shortenPseudonym returns first N chars for custom length
shortenPseudonym with length=0 returns empty string
shortenPseudonym with negative length returns empty string
shortenPseudonym with length exceeding input returns full string
shortenPseudonym throws when pseudonymBase64 is null/undefined
parseTimestamp returns number as-is for numeric input
parseTimestamp parses ISO 8601 date string to epoch ms
parseTimestamp throws for non-number/non-string input
parseTimestamp throws for unparseable date string
getDefaultTTL('direct') returns 300
getDefaultTTL('private') returns 3600
getDefaultTTL('public') returns 86400
getDefaultTTL throws for unknown message type
isExpired returns false for message within TTL
isExpired returns true for message past TTL
isExpired returns false for future timestamp (age clamped to 0)
isExpired returns true (fail-safe drop) for missing ttl
isExpired returns true (fail-safe drop) for missing timestamp
isExpired never throws even on malformed input
getRemainingTTL returns ~ttl for freshly created message
getRemainingTTL returns ~half ttl for half-expired message
getRemainingTTL returns 0 for expired message
getRemainingTTL returns full ttl for future timestamp
getRebroadcastProbability returns 0.6 for fresh message
getRebroadcastProbability returns 0.0 for expired message
getRebroadcastProbability returns 0.0 for ttl <= 0
getRebroadcastProbability never throws on any input
stampTTL sets ttl on package and returns same reference
stampTTL overwrites existing ttl field
stampTTL throws for null messagePackage
getBootstrapNodes returns at least 1 WebSocket URL from origin
getBootstrapNodes converts https:// to wss://
getBootstrapNodes converts http:// to ws://
createPeerExchangeRequest returns object with correct type and pubKey
createPeerExchangeResponse returns object with peers and pubKey
handlePeerExchangeRequest returns up to 5 peers excluding requester
handlePeerExchangeRequest excludes requester URL from results
handlePeerExchangeRequest throws for null message
handlePeerExchangeResponse adds peer URLs to cache
handlePeerExchangeResponse throws for null message
selectPeerForRotation returns URL with lowest connectedAt
selectPeerForRotation returns null for empty array
selectPeerForConnection returns URL from cache not in connected
selectPeerForConnection returns null when all cached peers connected
isProtocolMessage identifies peer_exchange_request as protocol
isProtocolMessage identifies peer_exchange_response as protocol
isProtocolMessage returns false for non-string data
isProtocolMessage returns false for invalid JSON string
isProtocolMessage returns false for JSON without peer_exchange_ type
isProtocolMessage never throws for any input
initializeDiscovery returns cleanup function and starts timers
initializeDiscovery cleanup clears both intervals
packageMessage produces padded binary frame with correct structure
packageMessage for private type uses pseudonym and omits pubKey
handleMessageSubmit calls preventDefault synchronously before await
handleMessageSubmit shows warning for message too long
handleIncomingFrame routes text protocol messages to discovery
handleIncomingFrame processes valid binary frame through full pipeline
handleIncomingFrame drops expired messages
handleIncomingFrame drops duplicate messages
handleIncomingFrame drops messages with pubKey but invalid signature
handleIncomingFrame drops messages with pubKey but missing signature
handleIncomingFrame skips signature verification for channel messages without pubKey
broadcastMessage sends binary frames as binary to all peers
broadcastMessage sends string frames as text to all peers
initializeWebSocket sets binaryType to arraybuffer
handleIncomingFrame rebroadcasts original raw frame bytes without re-encoding
handleMessageSubmit calls preventDefault before any async work
